# Schema Summary (auto-generated)

**Gateway** · **Wiki Home** · **Ontology & Schema** · Schema Summary

Living table of labels, relationships, schema tiers, and reasoning contracts, rendered from [`ontology.json`](../../../src/textgraphx/schema/ontology.json). The authoritative narrative is in [`../../schema.md`](../../schema.md) (and, once published, `schema-semantics.md` in this folder).

## Schema tiers

| Tier | Node labels | Relationship types |

| `canonical` | `AnnotatedText`, `Antecedent`, `CorefMention`, `Entity`, `EntityMention`, `EventMention`, `Frame`, `FrameArgument`, `NamedEntity`, `Sentence`, `Signal`, `TEvent`, `TIMEX`, `TagOccurrence`, `TimexMention`, `VALUE` | `AFFECTS`, `CLINK`, `CONTAINS_SENTENCE`, `COREF`, `CREATED_ON`, `DESCRIBES`, `EVENT_PARTICIPANT`, `FRAME_DESCRIBES_EVENT`, `GLINK`, `HAS_FRAME_ARGUMENT`, `HAS_LEMMA`, `HAS_NEXT`, `HAS_TOKEN`, `INSTANTIATES`, `IN_FRAME`, `IN_MENTION`, `IS_DEPENDENT`, `MODIFIES`, `PARTICIPANT`, `REFERS_TO`, `SLINK`, `TLINK`, `TRIGGERS` |

## Node labels (23)

| Label | Purpose | Key properties |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `AnnotatedText` | Document-level node | `id`, `text`, `author`, `creationtime`, `filename`, `filetype`, `title`, `publicId`, `uri` |
| `Antecedent` | Coref cluster head | `id`, `text`, `startIndex`, `endIndex` |
| `CorefMention` | Coreference mention | `id`, `text`, `startIndex`, `endIndex` |
| `Entity` | Canonical/disambiguated entity | `id`, `type`, `kb_id`, `wnLexname`, `wn_supersense` |
| `EntityMention` | Mention-level entity span abstraction | `id`, `doc_id`, `value`, `head`, `headTokenIndex`, `start_tok`, `end_tok`, `start_char`, `end_char` |
| `EventMention` | Mention-level event instantiation linked to canonical TEvent | `id`, `doc_id`, `pred`, `tense`, `aspect`, `class`, `factuality`, `start_tok`, `end_tok`, `start_char`, `end_char` |
| `Evidence` | Provenance/evidence node for relation extraction | `id`, `type` |
| `Frame` | SRL predicate frame | `id`, `headword`, `headTokenIndex`, `text`, `startIndex`, `endIndex` |
| `FrameArgument` | SRL argument span | `id`, `type`, `text`, `startIndex`, `endIndex`, `head`, `headTokenIndex`, `syntacticType`, `complementFullText` |
| `NUMERIC` | Canonical numeric participant type, typically represented as a dynamic label on selected NamedEntity mentions | `id`, `value`, `type` |
| `NamedEntity` | NER mention (surface) | `id`, `type`, `value`, `index`, `end_index`, `kb_id`, `score`, `normal_term`, `head`, `headTokenIndex`, `ent_class`, `nominalSemanticHead`, `wnLexname`, `wn_supersense` |
| `NounChunk` | Noun chunk span | `id`, `type`, `value` |
| `PhaseRun` | Operational phase audit marker | `id`, `phase`, `timestamp`, `duration_seconds`, `documents_processed` |
| `RefinementRun` | Refinement-phase audit marker | `id`, `timestamp`, `passes` |
| `Relationship` | High-level relation node between Entities | `id`, `type` |
| `Sentence` | Sentence container | `id`, `text` |
| `Signal` | Temporal trigger span | `id`, `doc_id`, `type`, `text`, `start_tok`, `end_tok`, `start_char`, `end_char` |
| `TEvent` | Temporal event | `eiid`, `doc_id`, `begin`, `end`, `class`, `tense`, `factuality` |
| `TIMEX` | Temporal expression | `tid`, `doc_id`, `type`, `value`, `text` |
| `Tag` | Lemma grouping node | `id` |
| `TagOccurrence` | Token-level node used across pipeline | `id`, `index`, `end_index`, `text`, `lemma`, `pos`, `upos`, `tok_index_doc`, `tok_index_sent`, `is_stop` |
| `TimexMention` | Mention-level temporal span abstraction linked to canonical TIMEX | `id`, `doc_id`, `tid`, `type`, `value`, `start_tok`, `end_tok`, `start_char`, `end_char` |
| `VALUE` | Canonical value expression node/label used for quantified participants | `id`, `type`, `value` |

## Relationships (30)

| Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `AFFECTS` | Entity\|NUMERIC\|VALUE\|FrameArgument -> TEvent\|EventMention (causal/influence relation) |
| `CLINK` | TEvent -> TEvent (properties: source) |
| `CONTAINS_SENTENCE` | AnnotatedText -> Sentence |
| `COREF` | CorefMention -> Antecedent |
| `CREATED_ON` | AnnotatedText\|PhaseRun\|RefinementRun -> date/time literal (properties: date) |
| `DESCRIBES` | Frame -> TEvent [transitioning — see deprecated_relationships] |
| `DESTINATION` | ne <- Evidence |
| `EVENT_PARTICIPANT` | Entity\|NUMERIC\|FrameArgument\|VALUE -> TEvent\|EventMention (canonical replacement for PARTICIPANT in participant context) |
| `FRAME_DESCRIBES_EVENT` | Frame -> TEvent (canonical replacement for DESCRIBES in this context) |
| `FROM` | entity <- Relationship |
| `GLINK` | TEvent -> TEvent (properties: id, relType, signalID, origin, rule) — grammatical link from TTK |
| `HAS_EVIDENCE` | Relationship -> Evidence |
| `HAS_FRAME_ARGUMENT` | FrameArgument -> Frame (canonical replacement for PARTICIPANT in this context) |
| `HAS_LEMMA` | TagOccurrence -> Tag |
| `HAS_NEXT` | TagOccurrence -> TagOccurrence (properties: sentence) |
| `HAS_TOKEN` | Sentence -> TagOccurrence |
| `INSTANTIATES` | Frame -> EventMention (canonical frame-to-mention event instantiation) |
| `IN_FRAME` | TagOccurrence -> (Frame\|FrameArgument) |
| `IN_MENTION` | TagOccurrence -> (NamedEntity\|EntityMention\|Antecedent\|CorefMention\|NounChunk) |
| `IS_DEPENDENT` | TagOccurrence -> TagOccurrence (properties: type) |
| `IS_RELATED_TO` | NamedEntity -> NamedEntity (properties: root, type) |
| `MODIFIES` | FrameArgument -> TEvent\|EventMention (non-core semantic modifier relation) |
| `PARTICIPANT` | FrameArgument -> Frame (properties: type, prep?) [transitioning — see deprecated_relationships] |
| `PARTICIPATES_IN` | TagOccurrence -> (NamedEntity\|Frame\|FrameArgument\|CorefMention\|Antecedent\|NounChunk) [legacy compatibility path] |
| `REFERS_TO` | Mention node -> canonical node (EntityMention/EventMention/TimexMention/NamedEntity/FrameArgument -> Entity\|TEvent\|TIMEX\|NamedEntity\|NUMERIC) |
| `SLINK` | TEvent -> TEvent (properties: source) |
| `SOURCE` | ne <- Evidence |
| `TLINK` | TEvent/TIMEX -> TEvent/TIMEX (properties: id, relType, signalID) |
| `TO` | entity <- Relationship |
| `TRIGGERS` | TagOccurrence -> TimexMention\|TEvent\|Signal (legacy direct TagOccurrence -> TIMEX tolerated during transition) |

## Temporal reasoning profile

- Canonical relation types: `BEFORE`, `AFTER`, `SIMULTANEOUS`, `INCLUDES`, `IS_INCLUDED`, `BEGINS`, `BEGUN_BY`, `ENDS`, `ENDED_BY`, `DURING`, `IDENTITY`, `VAGUE`
- Contradiction pairs: `4` defined
- Closure rules: `5` defined
- Consistency policy: `suppress_lower_confidence_conflicts`
- DCT anchor policy: `allow_case6_when_non_nominal_or_temporally_anchored`

| Attribute | Allowed values |

| `aspect` | `NONE`, `PROGRESSIVE`, `PERFECTIVE`, `PERFECTIVE_PROGRESSIVE` |
| `certainty` | `CERTAIN`, `PROBABLE`, `POSSIBLE`, `UNCERTAIN` |
| `factuality` | `ASSERTED`, `REPORTED`, `HYPOTHETICAL`, `NEGATED`, `COUNTERFACTUAL` |
| `modality_defaults` | `NONE`, `MUST`, `MAY`, `MIGHT`, `SHOULD`, `WOULD`, `COULD`, `CAN`, `WILL`, `SHALL` |
| `normalization_policy` | — |
| `polarity` | `POS`, `NEG` |
| `tense` | `PAST`, `PRESENT`, `FUTURE`, `NONE`, `INFINITIVE`, `PRESPART`, `PASTPART` |

## Deprecated relationships (3)

- `DESCRIBES` — Overloaded: used for both Frame->TEvent and Keyword->Document semantics. Split into semantically precise types.
- `PARTICIPANT` — Overloaded: used for FrameArgument->Frame and Entity|NUMERIC|FrameArgument->TEvent semantics. Split into precise types.
- `PARTICIPATES_IN` — Overloaded: used for both frame-attachment and mention-attachment token traversals. Split into explicit read/write contracts.
